mechanism_narrative: A declining federal funds rate signals the Fed shifting toward monetary accommodation, lowering the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows and easing financing conditions, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS trend and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or returns following FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly positive (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp year-over-year decline in housing starts reflects a deteriorating residential construction sector that historically leads broader economic contractions, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter as recession risk is priced in.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1638k units, sharply below prior housing boom peaks near 2000k
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in more than 55% of triggered instances despite the HOUST decline signal, or rank IC stays below 0.03 across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A deceleration in nonfarm payroll growth below trend signals weakening labor demand ahead of a broader slowdown, prompting equity markets to reprice growth expectations downward and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns following triggered PAYEMS deceleration events are not significantly negative (p > 0.05) across a 3-year walk-forward sample, or hit rate below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained slowdown in industrial production growth indicates weakening manufacturing activity and corporate earnings momentum, translating into muted or negative S&P 500 returns over the following trading week as short-term risk appetite adjusts.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO trend and 5d forward SPX returns remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, indicating no persistent short-horizon relationship.

mechanism_narrative: When the Federal Reserve cuts rates while unemployment is simultaneously rising, markets interpret the joint signal as confirmation of an unfolding recession rather than pure stimulus, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month despite the rate cut.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS declines while UNRATE rises within the same 3-month window
failure_condition: In periods where both conditions co-occur, 20d forward returns are positive in more than 55% of instances, or the interaction term shows no incremental predictive power over either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: During episodes of acute credit market stress, a falling federal funds rate is interpreted by investors as evidence of financial system fragility rather than accommodative easing, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following trading week as flight-to-safety dominates.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls more than 25bp within a single month amid credit stress conditions
evidence_refs: fact:August 2007 subprime-driven credit market disruption preceding this snapshot
failure_condition: 5d forward returns following triggered FEDFUNDS cuts during stress periods are not significantly negative (p > 0.05), or hit rate for negative returns is below 55% across identified stress episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in retail sales signals weakening consumer demand, which historically precedes downward revisions to corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns following negative RSAFS growth triggers are not significantly negative (p > 0.05) over a 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in housing starts and rise in unemployment reflects a broadening recessionary spiral spanning both construction and labor markets, jointly signaling deeper economic contraction than either indicator alone, and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines more than 15% YoY concurrent with UNRATE rising more than 0.3pp over 6 months
failure_condition: 60d forward returns during joint-trigger periods are positive in more than 50% of instances, or the interaction model's rank IC does not exceed the max of either single-series model by at least 0.02.
